languages.text: Яруб обещал ждать Вольного Торговца у госпиталя, чтобы передать клинок.

languages.text: Jarub promised to wait for the Rogue Trader by the hospital to hand over the blade.

languages.text: Jarub hat versprochen, im Krankenhaus auf {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} zu warten, um {mf|ihm|ihr} die Klinge zu übergeben.

languages.text: Jarub a promis d'attendre {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} près de l'hôpital pour lui donner l'épée.
languages.original_text: Jarub promised to wait for the Rogue Trader by the hospital to hand over the blade.

traits.locale_text: Jarub a promis d'attendre {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} près de l'hôpital pour lui donner l'épée.

languages.text: 雅鲁布答应在医院旁等待行商浪人，以转交那把剑。
languages.original_text: Jarub promised to wait for the Rogue Trader by the hospital to hand over the blade.

traits.locale_text: 雅鲁布答应在医院旁等待行商浪人，以转交那把剑。

languages.text: Jarub prometió esperar {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente junto al hospital para entregarle la espada.

languages.text: ヤルブは病院の外で自由商人を待ち、刃物を渡すと約束した。
languages.original_text: Yarub promised to wait for the Free Merchant outside the hospital to hand over the blade.

languages.text: Jarub, kılıcı teslim etmek için hastanenin yanında Hür Tacir'i bekleyeceğine söz verdi.
